PreceptDef.label: respected (awakened)
PreceptDef.description:
Only androids that have awakened to true sentience have earned respect and esteem. An ordinary, unawakened android is just a tool - a useful machine with no rights or moral standing.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Awakened androids are admired, like the "respected" precept.
 - Non-awakened androids are treated as tools and shown with a blue "owned" tint.

PreceptDef.label: equals (awakened)
PreceptDef.description:
An android that has awakened to true sentience stands as our equal, with the same rights and moral consideration as anyone else. One that has not is simply a tool - a useful machine with no rights or standing.

<color=#E5E54C>Gameplay effect:</color>
 - Awakened androids are treated as ordinary people.
 - Non-awakened androids are treated as tools and shown with a blue "owned" tint.
